what_it_does: A .gitignore for a Supabase CLI project directory. Ignores the .branches and .temp CLI-state directories and dotenvx secret/env files (.env.keys, .env.local, .env.*.local).
observations: Matches the default .gitignore the Supabase CLI generates on init
conventions: Keeps local CLI state and secrets out of version control
notes: The default Supabase CLI .gitignore ignoring local state dirs (.branches, .temp) and dotenvx env/secret files.
intention_signals: Keeps CLI-generated state and environment secrets out of git for the Supabase project.
contribution: Contributes the ignore rules excluding Supabase CLI state directories and dotenvx env/secret files from version control.
summary_for_embedding: A standard Supabase CLI .gitignore excluding .branches, .temp, and dotenvx .env/.env.keys files.
intention_for_embedding: To prevent Supabase CLI local state and environment secrets from being committed to git.
